rea-agents - v2.0.0
    Preparing search index...
    • application/BinarySessionPort
    • BinarySessionPort

    Interface BinarySessionPort

    Target lifecycle used by CLI and MCP without exposing a concrete provider.

    interface BinarySessionPort {
        activeTarget(): BinaryTarget | undefined;
        analysisProfile(
            operation?: AnalysisOperation,
        ):
            | {
                digest: string;
                parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
                provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string };
                provider_profile_schema_version: number;
                schema_version: 1;
            }
            | undefined;
        close(): Promise<Result<null, AnalysisError>>;
        evidenceById(
            evidenceId: string,
        ):
            | {
                analysis_profile: {
                    digest: string;
                    parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
                    provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string };
                    provider_profile_schema_version: number;
                    schema_version: 1;
                };
                authority: | "shipped-artifact"
                | "controlled-replay"
                | "historical-reference"
                | "external-service"
                | "analyst-inference";
                confidence: "observed"
                | "derived"
                | "inferred";
                environment:
                    | {
                        architecture: string;
                        id: string;
                        isolation: "process"
                        | "none"
                        | "container"
                        | "virtual-machine";
                        platform: string;
                    }
                    | null;
                evidence_id: string;
                evidence_links: string[];
                limitations: string[];
                locations: (
                    | { address: string; kind: "address" }
                    | { end: string; kind: "address-range"; start: string }
                    | { kind: "artifact-path"; path: string }
                    | { kind: "file-offset"; offset: number }
                    | { end: number; kind: "file-offset-range"; start: number }
                )[];
                normalized_result: JSONType;
                operation: string;
                parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
                predicate_type: string;
                provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string | null };
                raw_result: JSONType;
                schema_version: 2;
                subject:
                    | {
                        architecture: "x86"
                        | "x86_64"
                        | "arm"
                        | "arm64"
                        | null;
                        digest: { sha256: string };
                        format:
                            | "unknown"
                            | "file"
                            | "directory"
                            | "javascript"
                            | "source-map"
                            | "plist"
                            | "entitlements"
                            | "dmg"
                            | "zip"
                            | "pkg"
                            | "asar"
                            | "javascript-bundle"
                            | "mach-o-universal"
                            | "mach-o"
                            | "elf"
                            | "pe"
                            | "hopper"
                            | "analysis-database"
                            | "ipa"
                            | "apk";
                        local_path: string;
                        name: string;
                    }
                    | null;
            }
            | {
                authority: | "shipped-artifact"
                | "controlled-replay"
                | "historical-reference"
                | "external-service"
                | "analyst-inference";
                confidence: "observed"
                | "derived"
                | "inferred";
                environment:
                    | {
                        architecture: string;
                        id: string;
                        isolation: "process"
                        | "none"
                        | "container"
                        | "virtual-machine";
                        platform: string;
                    }
                    | null;
                evidence_id: string;
                evidence_links: string[];
                limitations: string[];
                locations: (
                    | { address: string; kind: "address" }
                    | { end: string; kind: "address-range"; start: string }
                    | { kind: "artifact-path"; path: string }

                        | "arm64"
                        | null;
                        digest: { sha256: string };
                        format:
                            | "unknown"
                            | "file"
                            | "directory"
                            | "javascript"
                            | "source-map"
                            | "plist"
                            | "entitlements"
                            | "dmg"
                            | "zip"
                            | "pkg"
                            | "asar"

                            | "pe"
                            | "hopper"
                            | "analysis-database"
                            | "ipa"
                            | "apk";
                        local_path: string;
                        name: string;
                    }
                    | null;
            }
            | undefined;
        execute(
            operation: AnalysisOperation,
            parameters: Readonly<Record<string, JsonValue>>,
            options?: ExecutionOptions,
        ): Promise<Result<AnalysisExecution, AnalysisError>>;
        exportAnalysisSnapshot(): Result<
            {
                binding: {
                    analysis_profile: {
                        digest: string;
                        parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;

                        provider_profile_schema_version: number;

                };

                    execution: {
                        limitations: string[];
                        locations: (
                            | { address: string; kind: "address" }
                            | { end: string; kind: "address-range"; start: string }
                            | { kind: "artifact-path"; path: string }
                            | { kind: "file-offset"; offset: number }
                            | { end: number; kind: "file-offset-range"; start: number }

                                architecture: "x86"
                                | "x86_64"
                                | "arm"
                                | "arm64"
                                | null;
                                format:
                                    | "unknown"
                                    | "file"
                                    | "directory"
                                    | "javascript"
                                    | "source-map"

                            }
                            | null;
                    };
                    operation: string;
                    parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
                    query_id: string;
                }[];

                        | "x86_64"

                            rationale: string;

                        | {

                        | null;

                        | null;

                            | "open"
                            | "investigating"
                            | "blocked"
                            | "contradicted"
                            | "resolved";

                    }[];
                };

                            | "container"
                            | "virtual-machine";
                            platform: string;
                        }
                        | null;
                    evidence_id: string;
                    evidence_links: string[];
                    limitations: string[];
                    locations: (
                        | { address: string; kind: "address" }
                        | { end: string; kind: "address-range"; start: string }
                        | { kind: "artifact-path"; path: string }
                        | { kind: "file-offset"; offset: number }
                        | { end: number; kind: "file-offset-range"; start: number }
                    )[];
                    normalized_result: JSONType;
                    operation: string;
                    parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
                    predicate_type: string;
                    provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string | null };
                    raw_result: JSONType;
                    schema_version: 2;
                    subject:
                        | {
                            architecture: "x86"
                            | "x86_64"
                            | "arm"
                            | "arm64"
                            | null;
                            digest: { sha256: string };
                            format:
                                | "unknown"
                                | "file"
                                | "directory"
                                | "javascript"
                                | "source-map"
                                | "plist"
                                | "entitlements"
                                | "dmg"
                                | "zip"
                                | "pkg"
                                | "asar"
                                | "javascript-bundle"
                                | "mach-o-universal"
                                | "mach-o"
                                | "elf"
                                | "pe"
                                | "hopper"
                                | "analysis-database"
                                | "ipa"
                                | "apk";
                            local_path: string;
                            name: string;
                        }
                        | null;
                }
            )[];
            scenarios: {
                authority: "controlled-replay";
                evidence_id: string;
                operation: string;
            }[];
            unknowns: {
                contradicting_evidence_ids: string[];
                domain: string;
                mutation_evidence_ids: string[];
                previous_revision_digest: string
                | null;
                question: string;
                recommended_probes: { operation: string; rationale: string }[];
                registry_version: 1;
                relationships: {
                    type: "depends-on" | "related-to" | "contradicts";
                    unknown_id: string;
                }[];
                required_authority: | "shipped-artifact"
                | "controlled-replay"
                | "historical-reference"
                | "external-service"
                | "analyst-inference"
                | null;
                required_confidence: "observed"
                | "derived"
                | "inferred";
                required_environment:
                    | {
                        architecture: string
                        | null;
                        id: string | null;
                        isolation: "process" | "none" | "container" | "virtual-machine" | null;
                        platform: string | null;
                    }
                    | null;
                resolution: | {
                    disposition: "verified";
                    evidence_ids: string[];
                    rationale: string;
                }
                | {
                    disposition: "withdrawn"
                    | "out-of-scope";
                    evidence_ids: string[];
                    rationale: string;
                }
                | null;
                revision: number;
                revision_digest: string;
                scope_digest: string
                | null;
                severity: "low" | "medium" | "high" | "critical";
                status:
                    | "open"
                    | "investigating"
                    | "blocked"
                    | "contradicted"
                    | "resolved";
                supporting_evidence_ids: string[];
                unknown_id: string;
            }[];
        };
        hasEvidence(evidenceId: string): boolean;
        importAnalysisSnapshot(
            snapshot: {
                binding: {
                    analysis_profile: {
                        digest: string;
                        parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
                        provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string };
                        provider_profile_schema_version: number;
                        schema_version: 1;
                    };
                    provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string };
                };
                entries: {
                    execution: {
                        limitations: string[];
                        locations: (
                            | { address: string; kind: "address" }
                            | { end: string; kind: "address-range"; start: string }
                            | { kind: "artifact-path"; path: string }
                            | { kind: "file-offset"; offset: number }
                            | { end: number; kind: "file-offset-range"; start: number }
                        )[];
                        provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string };
                        raw_result: JSONType;
                        result: JSONType;
                        subject:
                            | {
                                architecture: "x86"
                                | "x86_64"
                                | "arm"
                                | "arm64"
                                | null;
                                format:
                                    | "unknown"
                                    | "file"
                                    | "directory"
                                    | "javascript"
                                    | "source-map"
                                    | "plist"
                                    | "entitlements"
                                    | "dmg"
                                    | "zip"
                                    | "pkg"
                                    | "asar"
                                    | "javascript-bundle"
                                    | "mach-o-universal"
                                    | "mach-o"
                                    | "elf"
                                    | "pe"
                                    | "hopper"
                                    | "analysis-database"
                                    | "ipa"
                                    | "apk";
                                path: string;
                                sha256: string;
                            }
                            | null;
                    };
                    operation: string;
                    parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
                    query_id: string;
                }[];
                evidence_bundle: {
                    artifacts: {
                        architecture: "x86"
                        | "x86_64"
                        | "arm"
                        | "arm64"
                        | null;

                            | "pe"

                            | "analysis-database"
                            | "ipa"
                            | "apk";

                    bundle_version: 2;
                    captures: { evidence_id: string; predicate_type: string }[];
                    environments: {
                        architecture: string;

                        isolation: "process" | "none" | "container" | "virtual-machine";

                            | "external-service"

                            | "inferred";

                                | {

                    architecture: "x86"

            },
        ): Result<number, AnalysisError>;

            bundle: unknown,

                                        | "javascript-bundle"
                                        | "mach-o-universal"
                                        | "mach-o"
                                        | "elf"
                                        | "pe"
                                        | "hopper"
                                        | "analysis-database"
                                        | "ipa"
                                        | "apk";
                                    local_path: string;
                                    name: string;
                                }
                                | null;
                        }
                    )[];
                    scenarios: {
                        authority: "controlled-replay";
                        evidence_id: string;
                        operation: string;
                    }[];
                    unknowns: {
                        contradicting_evidence_ids: string[];
                        domain: string;
                        mutation_evidence_ids: string[];
                        previous_revision_digest: string
                        | null;
                        question: string;
                        recommended_probes: { operation: string; rationale: string }[];
                        registry_version: 1;
                        relationships: {
                            type: "depends-on" | "related-to" | "contradicts";
                            unknown_id: string;
                        }[];
                        required_authority: | "shipped-artifact"
                        | "controlled-replay"
                        | "historical-reference"
                        | "external-service"
                        | "analyst-inference"
                        | null;
                        required_confidence: "observed"
                        | "derived"
                        | "inferred";
                        required_environment:
                            | {
                                architecture: string
                                | null;
                                id: string | null;
                                isolation:
                                    | "process"
                                    | "none"
                                    | "container"
                                    | "virtual-machine"
                                    | null;
                                platform: string
                                | null;
                            }
                            | null;
                        resolution: | {
                            disposition: "verified";
                            evidence_ids: string[];
                            rationale: string;
                        }
                        | {
                            disposition: "withdrawn"
                            | "out-of-scope";
                            evidence_ids: string[];
                            rationale: string;
                        }
                        | null;
                        revision: number;
                        revision_digest: string;
                        scope_digest: string
                        | null;
                        severity: "low" | "medium" | "high" | "critical";
                        status:
                            | "open"
                            | "investigating"
                            | "blocked"
                            | "contradicted"
                            | "resolved";
                        supporting_evidence_ids: string[];
                        unknown_id: string;
                    }[];
                };
                name: string;
                previous_revision_digest: string
                | null;
                revision: number;
                revision_digest: string;
                runs: (
                    | {
                        comparison_evidence_id: string
                        | null;
                        completed_stages: (
                            | "inventory_left"
                            | "inventory_right"
                            | "compare_artifacts"
                            | "find_changed_behavior"
                        )[];
                        integrity_continue_approved: boolean;
                        integrity_policy: "fail"
                        | "record-and-continue";
                        left: {
                            format:
                                | "unknown"
                                | "file"
                                | "directory"
                                | "javascript"
                                | "source-map"
                                | "plist"
                                | "entitlements"
                                | "dmg"
                                | "zip"
                                | "pkg"
                                | "asar"
                                | "javascript-bundle"
                                | "mach-o-universal"
                                | "mach-o"
                                | "elf"
                                | "pe"
                                | "hopper"
                                | "analysis-database"
                                | "ipa"
                                | "apk";
                            graph_sha256: string;
                            manifest_id: string;
                            root_sha256: string;
                        };
                        left_inventory_evidence_ids: string[];
                        limitations: string[];
                        max_integrity_mismatches: number;
                        options: {
                            change_limit: number;
                            max_compression_ratio: number;
                            max_depth: number;
                            max_entries: number;
                            max_entry_bytes: number;
                            max_path_bytes: number;
                            max_total_bytes: number;
                            page_size: number;
                        };
                        request_sha256: string;
                        result_evidence_id: string
                        | null;
                        right: {
                            format:
                                | "unknown"
                                | "file"
                                | "directory"
                                | "javascript"
                                | "source-map"
                                | "plist"
                                | "entitlements"
                                | "dmg"
                                | "zip"
                                | "pkg"
                                | "asar"
                                | "javascript-bundle"
                                | "mach-o-universal"
                                | "mach-o"
                                | "elf"
                                | "pe"
                                | "hopper"
                                | "analysis-database"
                                | "ipa"
                                | "apk";
                            graph_sha256: string;
                            manifest_id: string;
                            root_sha256: string;
                        };
                        right_inventory_evidence_ids: string[];
                        run_id: string;
                        schema_version: 1;
                        status: "complete"
                        | "running";
                    }
                    | {
                        comparison_evidence_id: string
                        | null;
                        completed_stages: (
                            | "inventory_left"
                            | "inventory_right"
                            | "compare_artifacts"
                            | "find_changed_behavior"
                        )[];
                        integrity_continue_approved: boolean;
                        integrity_policy: "fail"
                        | "record-and-continue";
                        left: {
                            format:
                                | "unknown"
                                | "file"
                                | "directory"
                                | "javascript"
                                | "source-map"
                                | "plist"
                                | "entitlements"
                                | "dmg"
                                | "zip"
                                | "pkg"

                                | "pe"

                            manifest_id: string;
                            root_sha256: string;
                        };
                        left_inventory_evidence_ids: string[];
                        legacy_request_identity: true;
                        limitations: string[];
                        max_integrity_mismatches: number;
                        options: {
                            change_limit: number;
                            max_compression_ratio: number;
                            max_depth: number;
                            max_entries: number;
                            max_entry_bytes: number;
                            max_path_bytes: number;
                            max_total_bytes: number;
                            page_size: number;
                        };

                        result_evidence_id: string
                        | null;
                        right: {
                            format:
                                | "unknown"
                                | "file"
                                | "directory"
                                | "javascript"
                                | "source-map"
                                | "plist"
                                | "entitlements"
                                | "dmg"
                                | "zip"
                                | "pkg"
                                | "asar"
                                | "javascript-bundle"
                                | "mach-o-universal"
                                | "mach-o"
                                | "elf"
                                | "pe"
                                | "hopper"
                                | "analysis-database"
                                | "ipa"
                                | "apk";

                            manifest_id: string;
                            root_sha256: string;
                        };
                        right_inventory_evidence_ids: string[];
                        run_id: string;
                        schema_version: 1;
                        status: "complete"
                        | "running";
                    }
                )[];
                workspace_id: string;
                workspace_version: 1;
            }
            | undefined;
        investigationWorkspaces(): readonly {
            bundle: {
                artifacts: {
                    architecture: "x86"
                    | "x86_64"
                    | "arm"
                    | "arm64"
                    | null;
                    digest: { sha256: string };
                    format:
                        | "unknown"
                        | "file"
                        | "directory"
                        | "javascript"
                        | "source-map"
                        | "plist"
                        | "entitlements"
                        | "dmg"
                        | "zip"
                        | "pkg"
                        | "asar"
                        | "javascript-bundle"
                        | "mach-o-universal"
                        | "mach-o"
                        | "elf"
                        | "pe"
                        | "hopper"
                        | "analysis-database"
                        | "ipa"
                        | "apk";
                }[];
                bundle_version: 2;
                captures: { evidence_id: string; predicate_type: string }[];
                environments: {
                    architecture: string;
                    id: string;
                    isolation: "process" | "none" | "container" | "virtual-machine";
                    platform: string;
                }[];
                providers: { id: string; name: string; version: string
                | null }[];
                records: (
                    | {
                        analysis_profile: {
                            digest: string;
                            parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
                            provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string };
                            provider_profile_schema_version: number;
                            schema_version: 1;
                        };
                        authority: | "shipped-artifact"
                        | "controlled-replay"
                        | "historical-reference"
                        | "external-service"
                        | "analyst-inference";
                        confidence: "observed"
                        | "derived"
                        | "inferred";
                        environment:
                            | {
                                architecture: string;
                                id: string;
                                isolation: "process"
                                | "none"
                                | "container"
                                | "virtual-machine";
                                platform: string;
                            }
                            | null;
                        evidence_id: string;
                        evidence_links: string[];
                        limitations: string[];
                        locations: (
                            | { address: string; kind: "address" }
                            | { end: string; kind: "address-range"; start: string }
                            | { kind: "artifact-path"; path: string }
                            | { kind: "file-offset"; offset: number }
                            | { end: number; kind: "file-offset-range"; start: number }
                        )[];
                        normalized_result: JSONType;
                        operation: string;
                        parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
                        predicate_type: string;
                        provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string | null };
                        raw_result: JSONType;
                        schema_version: 2;
                        subject:
                            | {
                                architecture: "x86"
                                | "x86_64"
                                | "arm"
                                | "arm64"
                                | null;
                                digest: { sha256: string };
                                format:
                                    | "unknown"
                                    | "file"
                                    | "directory"
                                    | "javascript"
                                    | "source-map"
                                    | "plist"
                                    | "entitlements"
                                    | "dmg"

                                    | "elf"
                                    | "pe"
                                    | "hopper"
                                    | "analysis-database"
                                    | "ipa"
                                    | "apk";
                                local_path: string;
                                name: string;
                            }
                            | null;
                    }

                        authority: | "shipped-artifact"
                        | "controlled-replay"
                        | "historical-reference"

                        max_path_bytes: number;
                        max_total_bytes: number;
                        page_size: number;
                    };
                    request_sha256: string;
                    result_evidence_id: string
                    | null;
                    right: {
                        format:
                            | "unknown"
                            | "file"
                            | "directory"
                            | "javascript"
                            | "source-map"
                            | "plist"
                            | "entitlements"
                            | "dmg"
                            | "zip"
                            | "pkg"
                            | "asar"
                            | "javascript-bundle"
                            | "mach-o-universal"
                            | "mach-o"
                            | "elf"
                            | "pe"
                            | "hopper"
                            | "analysis-database"
                            | "ipa"
                            | "apk";
                        graph_sha256: string;
                        manifest_id: string;
                        root_sha256: string;
                    };
                    right_inventory_evidence_ids: string[];
                    run_id: string;
                    schema_version: 1;
                    status: "complete"
                    | "running";
                }
            )[];
            workspace_id: string;
            workspace_version: 1;
        }[];
        listUnknowns(
            filters?: {
                domain?: string;
                severity?: "low" | "medium" | "high" | "critical";
                status?:
                    | "open"
                    | "investigating"
                    | "blocked"
                    | "contradicted"
                    | "resolved";
            },
        ): {
            contradicting_evidence_ids: string[];
            domain: string;
            mutation_evidence_ids: string[];
            previous_revision_digest: string
            | null;
            question: string;
            recommended_probes: { operation: string; rationale: string }[];
            registry_version: 1;
            relationships: {
                type: "depends-on" | "related-to" | "contradicts";
                unknown_id: string;
            }[];
            required_authority: | "shipped-artifact"
            | "controlled-replay"
            | "historical-reference"
            | "external-service"
            | "analyst-inference"
            | null;
            required_confidence: "observed"
            | "derived"
            | "inferred";
            required_environment:
                | {
                    architecture: string
                    | null;
                    id: string | null;
                    isolation: "process" | "none" | "container" | "virtual-machine" | null;
                    platform: string | null;
                }
                | null;
            resolution: | {
                disposition: "verified";
                evidence_ids: string[];
                rationale: string;
            }
            | {
                disposition: "withdrawn"
                | "out-of-scope";
                evidence_ids: string[];
                rationale: string;
            }
            | null;
            revision: number;
            revision_digest: string;
            scope_digest: string
            | null;
            severity: "low" | "medium" | "high" | "critical";
            status: "open" | "investigating" | "blocked" | "contradicted" | "resolved";
            supporting_evidence_ids: string[];
            unknown_id: string;
        }[];
        onAvailabilityChanged?(listener: () => void | Promise<void>): () => void;
        open(
            path: string,
            options?: {
                providerId?: string;
                signal?: AbortSignal;
                snapshot?: {
                    binding: {
                        analysis_profile: {
                            digest: string;
                            parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
                            provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string };
                            provider_profile_schema_version: number;
                            schema_version: 1;
                        };
                        provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string };
                    };
                    entries: {
                        execution: {
                            limitations: string[];
                            locations: (
                                | { address: string; kind: "address" }
                                | { end: string; kind: "address-range"; start: string }
                                | { kind: "artifact-path"; path: string }
                                | { kind: "file-offset"; offset: number }
                                | { end: number; kind: "file-offset-range"; start: number }
                            )[];
                            provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string };
                            raw_result: JSONType;
                            result: JSONType;
                            subject:
                                | {
                                    architecture: "x86"
                                    | "x86_64"
                                    | "arm"
                                    | "arm64"
                                    | null;
                                    format:
                                        | "unknown"
                                        | "file"
                                        | "directory"
                                        | "javascript"
                                        | "source-map"
                                        | "plist"
                                        | "entitlements"
                                        | "dmg"
                                        | "zip"

                                        | "elf"
                                        | "pe"
                                        | "hopper"
                                        | "analysis-database"
                                        | "ipa"
                                        | "apk";
                                    path: string;
                                    sha256: string;
                                }
                                | null;
                        };
                        operation: string;
                        parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
                        query_id: string;
                    }[];
                    evidence_bundle: {
                        artifacts: {
                            architecture: "x86"
                            | "x86_64"
                            | "arm"
                            | "arm64"
                            | null;
                            digest: { sha256: string };
                            format:
                                | "unknown"
                                | "file"
                                | "directory"
                                | "javascript"
                                | "source-map"
                                | "plist"
                                | "entitlements"
                                | "dmg"
                                | "zip"

                                | "mach-o-universal"

                                | "elf"
                                | "pe"
                                | "hopper"
                                | "analysis-database"
                                | "ipa"
                                | "apk";
                        }[];
                        bundle_version: 2;
                        captures: { evidence_id: string; predicate_type: string }[];
                        environments: {
                            architecture: string;
                            id: string;
                            isolation: "process" | "none" | "container" | "virtual-machine";
                            platform: string;
                        }[];
                        providers: { id: string; name: string; version: string
                        | null }[];
                        records: (
                            | {
                                analysis_profile: {
                                    digest: string;
                                    parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;

                                | "external-service"

                                | "inferred";

                                        architecture: string;

                                    | { end: ...; kind: ...; start: ... }

                                    | { kind: ...; offset: ... }
                                    | { end: ...; kind: ...; start: ... }
                                )[];

                                | "controlled-replay"
                                | "historical-reference"

                            | "controlled-replay"
                            | "historical-reference"
                            | "external-service"

                        }[];

                        architecture: "x86"
                        | "x86_64"
                        | "arm"
                        | "arm64"
                        | null;

                        | "database"

                        | "artifact";
                        sha256: string;
                    };
                };
                targetKind?: "executable"
                | "database"
                | "archive"
                | "artifact";
            },
        ): Promise<Result<BinaryTarget, AnalysisError>>;

            evidence:
                | {
                    analysis_profile: {
                        digest: string;
                        parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
                        provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string };

                        | {
                            architecture: string;

                            | "container"

                        }

                    limitations: string[];

                        | { address: string; kind: "address" }

                    schema_version: 2;
                    subject:
                        | {
                            architecture: "x86"
                            | "x86_64"
                            | "arm"
                            | "arm64"
                            | null;

                            format:
                                | "unknown"
                                | "file"
                                | "directory"
                                | "javascript"
                                | "source-map"

                                | "entitlements"

                                | "ipa"
                                | "apk";

                            name: string;
                        }
                        | null;
                }
                | {
                    authority: | "shipped-artifact"
                    | "controlled-replay"
                    | "historical-reference"
                    | "external-service"

                                | "javascript"
                                | "source-map"
                                | "plist"

                        }
                        | null;
                },
        ): Result<
            "added"
            | "duplicate",
            EvidenceIntegrityError | EvidenceLimitError,
        >;

            evidence:
                | {
                    analysis_profile: {

                    evidence_links: string[];
                    limitations: string[];

                        | { end: string; kind: "address-range"; start: string }
                        | { kind: "artifact-path"; path: string }
                        | { kind: "file-offset"; offset: number }
                        | { end: number; kind: "file-offset-range"; start: number }
                    )[];

                    parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
                    predicate_type: string;
                    provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string | null };
                    raw_result: JSONType;
                    schema_version: 2;
                    subject:
                        | {
                            architecture: "x86"
                            | "x86_64"
                            | "arm"
                            | "arm64"
                            | null;
                            digest: { sha256: string };
                            format:
                                | "unknown"
                                | "file"
                                | "directory"
                                | "javascript"
                                | "source-map"
                                | "plist"
                                | "entitlements"
                                | "dmg"
                                | "zip"
                                | "pkg"
                                | "asar"

                                | "elf"
                                | "pe"
                                | "hopper"
                                | "analysis-database"
                                | "ipa"
                                | "apk";
                            local_path: string;
                            name: string;
                        }
                        | null;
                }
                | {
                    authority: | "shipped-artifact"
                    | "controlled-replay"
                    | "historical-reference"
                    | "external-service"
                    | "analyst-inference";
                    confidence: "observed"
                    | "derived"
                    | "inferred";
                    environment:
                        | {
                            architecture: string;
                            id: string;
                            isolation: "process"
                            | "none"
                            | "container"
                            | "virtual-machine";
                            platform: string;
                        }
                        | null;

                    evidence_links: string[];
                    limitations: string[];
                    locations: (
                        | { address: string; kind: "address" }
                        | { end: string; kind: "address-range"; start: string }
                        | { kind: "artifact-path"; path: string }
                        | { kind: "file-offset"; offset: number }
                        | { end: number; kind: "file-offset-range"; start: number }
                    )[];

                        | {
                            architecture: "x86"
                            | "x86_64"
                            | "arm"
                            | "arm64"
                            | null;

                                | "unknown"
                                | "file"
                                | "directory"
                                | "javascript"
                                | "source-map"
                                | "plist"
                                | "entitlements"
                                | "dmg"

                                | "pe"

                            name: string;
                        }
                        | null;
                },
            input: {
                approved: true;
                contradicting_evidence_ids: string[];
                domain: string;
                question: string;
                recommended_probes: { operation: string; rationale: string }[];
                relationships: {
                    type: "depends-on" | "related-to" | "contradicts";
                    unknown_id: string;
                }[];
                required_authority: | "shipped-artifact"
                | "controlled-replay"
                | "historical-reference"
                | "external-service"
                | "analyst-inference"
                | null;
                required_confidence: "observed"
                | "derived"
                | "inferred";
                required_environment:
                    | {
                        architecture: string
                        | null;
                        id: string | null;
                        isolation: "process" | "none" | "container" | "virtual-machine" | null;
                        platform: string | null;
                    }
                    | null;
                severity: "low"
                | "medium"
                | "high"
                | "critical";
                supporting_evidence_ids: string[];
            },
        ): Result<
            | {
                contradicting_evidence_ids: string[];
                domain: string;
                mutation_evidence_ids: string[];
                previous_revision_digest: string

                    type: "depends-on" | "related-to" | "contradicts";
                    unknown_id: string;
                }[];

                | "controlled-replay"
                | "historical-reference"
                | "external-service"
                | "analyst-inference"
                | null;

                    | {

                        id: string | null;
                        isolation: "process" | "none" | "container" | "virtual-machine" | null;
                        platform: string | null;
                    }
                    | null;
                resolution: | {
                    disposition: "verified";
                    evidence_ids: string[];
                    rationale: string;
                }
                | {
                    disposition: "withdrawn"
                    | "out-of-scope";
                    evidence_ids: string[];
                    rationale: string;
                }
                | null;
                revision: number;
                revision_digest: string;
                scope_digest: string
                | null;
                severity: "low" | "medium" | "high" | "critical";
                status:
                    | "open"
                    | "investigating"
                    | "blocked"
                    | "contradicted"
                    | "resolved";
                supporting_evidence_ids: string[];
                unknown_id: string;
            }
            | null,
            AnalysisError,
        >;
        recordUnknown(

            },

        retainInvestigationWorkspace(
            workspace: {
                bundle: {
                    artifacts: {
                        architecture: "x86" | "x86_64" | "arm" | "arm64" | null;
                        digest: { sha256: string };
                        format:
                            | "unknown"
                            | "file"
                            | "directory"
                            | "javascript"
                            | "source-map"

                            | "dmg"

                            | "pkg"

                            | "pe"
                            | "hopper"
                            | "analysis-database"
                            | "ipa"
                            | "apk";
                    }[];
                    bundle_version: 2;
                    captures: { evidence_id: string; predicate_type: string }[];
                    environments: {
                        architecture: string;
                        id: string;
                        isolation: "process" | "none" | "container" | "virtual-machine";
                        platform: string;
                    }[];
                    providers: { id: string; name: string; version: string
                    | null }[];
                    records: (
                        | {
                            analysis_profile: {
                                digest: string;
                                parameters: Record<string, JSONType>;
                                provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string };
                                provider_profile_schema_version: number;

                            | "controlled-replay"

                            | "inferred";

                                    architecture: string;

                                    isolation: "process"

                                    | "container"

                                    | "x86_64"

                                | {
                                    architecture: "x86"
                                    | "x86_64"
                                    | "arm"
                                    | "arm64"

                                        | "unknown"
                                        | "file"

                    }[];
                    unknowns: {
                        contradicting_evidence_ids: string[];
                        domain: string;
                        mutation_evidence_ids: string[];
                        previous_revision_digest: string
                        | null;
                        question: string;
                        recommended_probes: { operation: string; rationale: string }[];
                        registry_version: 1;
                        relationships: {
                            type: "depends-on" | "related-to" | "contradicts";
                            unknown_id: string;
                        }[];
                        required_authority: | "shipped-artifact"
                        | "controlled-replay"
                        | "historical-reference"
                        | "external-service"
                        | "analyst-inference"
                        | null;
                        required_confidence: "observed"
                        | "derived"
                        | "inferred";
                        required_environment:
                            | {
                                architecture: string
                                | null;
                                id: string | null;
                                isolation:
                                    | "process"
                                    | "none"
                                    | "container"
                                    | "virtual-machine"
                                    | null;
                                platform: string
                                | null;
                            }
                            | null;
                        resolution: | {
                            disposition: "verified";
                            evidence_ids: string[];
                            rationale: string;
                        }
                        | {
                            disposition: "withdrawn"
                            | "out-of-scope";
                            evidence_ids: string[];
                            rationale: string;
                        }
                        | null;
                        revision: number;
                        revision_digest: string;
                        scope_digest: string
                        | null;
                        severity: "low" | "medium" | "high" | "critical";
                        status:
                            | "open"
                            | "investigating"
                            | "blocked"
                            | "contradicted"
                            | "resolved";
                        supporting_evidence_ids: string[];
                        unknown_id: string;
                    }[];
                };
                name: string;
                previous_revision_digest: string
                | null;
                revision: number;
                revision_digest: string;
                runs: (
                    | {
                        comparison_evidence_id: string
                        | null;
                        completed_stages: (
                            | "inventory_left"
                            | "inventory_right"
                            | "compare_artifacts"
                            | "find_changed_behavior"
                        )[];
                        integrity_continue_approved: boolean;
                        integrity_policy: "fail"
                        | "record-and-continue";
                        left: {
                            format:
                                | "unknown"
                                | "file"
                                | "directory"
                                | "javascript"
                                | "source-map"
                                | "plist"
                                | "entitlements"
                                | "dmg"
                                | "zip"
                                | "pkg"
                                | "asar"
                                | "javascript-bundle"
                                | "mach-o-universal"
                                | "mach-o"
                                | "elf"
                                | "pe"
                                | "hopper"
                                | "analysis-database"
                                | "ipa"
                                | "apk";
                            graph_sha256: string;
                            manifest_id: string;
                            root_sha256: string;
                        };
                        left_inventory_evidence_ids: string[];
                        limitations: string[];
                        max_integrity_mismatches: number;
                        options: {
                            change_limit: number;
                            max_compression_ratio: number;
                            max_depth: number;
                            max_entries: number;
                            max_entry_bytes: number;
                            max_path_bytes: number;
                            max_total_bytes: number;
                            page_size: number;
                        };
                        request_sha256: string;
                        result_evidence_id: string
                        | null;
                        right: {
                            format:
                                | "unknown"
                                | "file"
                                | "directory"
                                | "javascript"
                                | "source-map"
                                | "plist"
                                | "entitlements"
                                | "dmg"
                                | "zip"
                                | "pkg"
                                | "asar"
                                | "javascript-bundle"
                                | "mach-o-universal"
                                | "mach-o"
                                | "elf"
                                | "pe"
                                | "hopper"
                                | "analysis-database"
                                | "ipa"
                                | "apk";
                            graph_sha256: string;
                            manifest_id: string;
                            root_sha256: string;
                        };
                        right_inventory_evidence_ids: string[];
                        run_id: string;
                        schema_version: 1;
                        status: "complete"
                        | "running";
                    }
                    | {
                        comparison_evidence_id: string
                        | null;
                        completed_stages: (
                            | "inventory_left"
                            | "inventory_right"
                            | "compare_artifacts"
                            | "find_changed_behavior"
                        )[];
                        integrity_continue_approved: boolean;
                        integrity_policy: "fail"
                        | "record-and-continue";
                        left: {
                            format:
                                | "unknown"
                                | "file"
                                | "directory"

                            manifest_id: string;
                            root_sha256: string;
                        };

                        legacy_request_identity: true;

                        options: {
                            change_limit: number;
                            max_compression_ratio: number;

                            max_entries: number;

                        | "running";
                    }
                )[];

                              | null;

                                  | "unknown"

                                  | "javascript"
                                  | "source-map"
                                  | "plist"
                                  | "entitlements"

                          }

                          provider: { id: string; name: string; version: string | null };
                          raw_result: JSONType;
                          schema_version: 2;
                          subject:
                              | {
                                  architecture: "x86"
                                  | "x86_64"
                                  | "arm"
                                  | "arm64"
                                  | null;

                                      | "unknown"
                                      | "file"

                                      | "javascript"
                                      | "source-map"

                                      | "pe"
                                      | "hopper"
                                      | "analysis-database"
                                      | "ipa"
                                      | "apk";

                                  name: string;
                              }
                              | null;
                      }
                  )[];
                  scenarios: {
                      authority: "controlled-replay";
                      evidence_id: string;
                      operation: string;
                  }[];
                  unknowns: {
                      contradicting_evidence_ids: string[];
                      domain: string;
                      mutation_evidence_ids: string[];
                      previous_revision_digest: string
                      | null;
                      question: string;
                      recommended_probes: { operation: string; rationale: string }[];
                      registry_version: 1;
                      relationships: {
                          type: "depends-on" | "related-to" | "contradicts";
                          unknown_id: string;
                      }[];
                      required_authority: | "shipped-artifact"
                      | "controlled-replay"
                      | "historical-reference"
                      | "external-service"
                      | "analyst-inference"
                      | null;
                      required_confidence: "observed"
                      | "derived"
                      | "inferred";
                      required_environment:
                          | {
                              architecture: string
                              | null;
                              id: string | null;
                              isolation: "process" | "none" | "container" | "virtual-machine" | null;
                              platform: string | null;
                          }
                          | null;
                      resolution: | {
                          disposition: "verified";
                          evidence_ids: string[];
                          rationale: string;
                      }
                      | {
                          disposition: "withdrawn"
                          | "out-of-scope";
                          evidence_ids: string[];
                          rationale: string;
                      }
                      | null;
                      revision: number;
                      revision_digest: string;
                      scope_digest: string
                      | null;
                      severity: "low" | "medium" | "high" | "critical";
                      status:
                          | "open"
                          | "investigating"
                          | "blocked"
                          | "contradicted"
                          | "resolved";
                      supporting_evidence_ids: string[];
                      unknown_id: string;
                  }[];
              };
              name: string;
              previous_revision_digest: string
              | null;

              revision_digest: string;
              runs: (
                  | {

                      | null;
                      completed_stages: (
                          | "inventory_left"
                          | "inventory_right"
                          | "compare_artifacts"
                          | "find_changed_behavior"
                      )[];

                      | "record-and-continue";

                                  | "unknown"
                                  | "file"
                                  | "directory"
                                  | "javascript"
                                  | "source-map"
                                  | "plist"
                                  | "entitlements"
                                  | "dmg"
                                  | "zip"
                                  | "pkg"
                                  | "asar"
                                  | "javascript-bundle"
                                  | "mach-o-universal"
                                  | "mach-o"
                                  | "elf"
                                  | "pe"
                                  | "hopper"
                                  | "analysis-database"
                                  | "ipa"
                                  | "apk";
                              local_path: string;
                              name: string;
                          }
                          | null;
                  }
              )[];
              scenarios: {
                  authority: "controlled-replay";
                  evidence_id: string;
                  operation: string;
              }[];
              unknowns: {
                  contradicting_evidence_ids: string[];
                  domain: string;
                  mutation_evidence_ids: string[];
                  previous_revision_digest: string
                  | null;
                  question: string;
                  recommended_probes: { operation: string; rationale: string }[];
                  registry_version: 1;
                  relationships: {
                      type: "depends-on" | "related-to" | "contradicts";
                      unknown_id: string;
                  }[];
                  required_authority: | "shipped-artifact"
                  | "controlled-replay"
                  | "historical-reference"
                  | "external-service"
                  | "analyst-inference"
                  | null;
                  required_confidence: "observed"
                  | "derived"
                  | "inferred";
                  required_environment:
                      | {
                          architecture: string
                          | null;
                          id: string | null;
                          isolation: "process" | "none" | "container" | "virtual-machine" | null;
                          platform: string | null;
                      }
                      | null;
                  resolution: | {
                      disposition: "verified";
                      evidence_ids: string[];
                      rationale: string;
                  }
                  | {
                      disposition: "withdrawn"
                      | "out-of-scope";
                      evidence_ids: string[];
                      rationale: string;
                  }
                  | null;
                  revision: number;
                  revision_digest: string;
                  scope_digest: string
                  | null;
                  severity: "low" | "medium" | "high" | "critical";
                  status:
                      | "open"
                      | "investigating"
                      | "blocked"
                      | "contradicted"
                      | "resolved";
                  supporting_evidence_ids: string[];
                  unknown_id: string;
              }[];
          };
          name: string;
          previous_revision_digest: string
          | null;
          revision: number;
          revision_digest: string;
          runs: (
              | {
                  comparison_evidence_id: string
                  | null;
                  completed_stages: (
                      | "inventory_left"
                      | "inventory_right"
                      | "compare_artifacts"
                      | "find_changed_behavior"
                  )[];
                  integrity_continue_approved: boolean;
                  integrity_policy: "fail"
                  | "record-and-continue";
                  left: {
                      format:
                          | "unknown"
                          | "file"
                          | "directory"
                          | "javascript"
                          | "source-map"
                          | "plist"
                          | "entitlements"
                          | "dmg"
                          | "zip"
                          | "pkg"
                          | "asar"
                          | "javascript-bundle"
                          | "mach-o-universal"
                          | "mach-o"
                          | "elf"
                          | "pe"
                          | "hopper"
                          | "analysis-database"
                          | "ipa"
                          | "apk";
                      graph_sha256: string;
                      manifest_id: string;
                      root_sha256: string;
                  };
                  left_inventory_evidence_ids: string[];
                  limitations: string[];
                  max_integrity_mismatches: number;
                  options: {
                      change_limit: number;
                      max_compression_ratio: number;
                      max_depth: number;
                      max_entries: number;
                      max_entry_bytes: number;
                      max_path_bytes: number;
                      max_total_bytes: number;
                      page_size: number;
                  };
                  request_sha256: string;
                  result_evidence_id: string
                  | null;
                  right: {
                      format:
                          | "unknown"
                          | "file"
                          | "directory"
                          | "javascript"
                          | "source-map"
                          | "plist"
                          | "entitlements"
                          | "dmg"
                          | "zip"
                          | "pkg"
                          | "asar"
                          | "javascript-bundle"
                          | "mach-o-universal"
                          | "mach-o"
                          | "elf"
                          | "pe"
                          | "hopper"
                          | "analysis-database"
                          | "ipa"
                          | "apk";
                      graph_sha256: string;
                      manifest_id: string;
                      root_sha256: string;
                  };
                  right_inventory_evidence_ids: string[];
                  run_id: string;
                  schema_version: 1;
                  status: "complete"
                  | "running";
              }
              | {
                  comparison_evidence_id: string
                  | null;
                  completed_stages: (
                      | "inventory_left"
                      | "inventory_right"
                      | "compare_artifacts"
                      | "find_changed_behavior"
                  )[];
                  integrity_continue_approved: boolean;
                  integrity_policy: "fail"
                  | "record-and-continue";

                      format:
                          | "unknown"
                          | "file"

                      root_sha256: string;

    open

    • open(
          path: string,
          options?: {

                          required_confidence: "observed"
                          | "derived"
                          | "inferred";
                          required_environment:
                              | {
                                  architecture: string
                                  | null;
                                  id: string | null;
                                  isolation:
                                      | "process"
                                      | "none"
                                      | "container"
                                      | "virtual-machine"
                                      | null;
                                  platform: string
                                  | null;
                              }
                              | null;
                          resolution: | {
                              disposition: "verified";
                              evidence_ids: string[];
                              rationale: string;
                          }
                          | {
                              disposition: "withdrawn"
                              | "out-of-scope";
                              evidence_ids: string[];
                              rationale: string;
                          }
                          | null;
                          revision: number;
                          revision_digest: string;
                          scope_digest: string
                          | null;
                          severity: "low" | "medium" | "high" | "critical";
                          status:
                              | "open"
                              | "investigating"
                              | "blocked"
                              | "contradicted"
                              | "resolved";
                          supporting_evidence_ids: string[];
                          unknown_id: string;
                      }[];
                  };
                  snapshot_version: 2;
                  target: {
                      architecture: "x86"
                      | "x86_64"
                      | "arm"
                      | "arm64"
                      | null;
                      format:
                          | "javascript"
                          | "source-map"
                          | "plist"
                          | "dmg"
                          | "zip"
                          | "pkg"

                          | "mach-o"
                          | "elf"
                          | "pe"
                          | "analysis-database"
                          | "ipa"
                          | "apk";
                      kind: "executable"
                      | "database"
                      | "archive"
                      | "artifact";
                      sha256: string;
                  };
              };
              targetKind?: "executable"
              | "database"
              | "archive"
              | "artifact";
          },
      ): Promise<Result<BinaryTarget, AnalysisError>>

                | "inferred";

                        isolation: "process"

                        | "container"

                        platform: string;
                    }
                    | null;

                evidence_links: string[];
                limitations: string[];

                    | { end: string; kind: "address-range"; start: string }
                    | { kind: "artifact-path"; path: string }
                    | { kind: "file-offset"; offset: number }
                    | { end: number; kind: "file-offset-range"; start: number }

                    }
                    | null;

              | "controlled-replay"
              | "historical-reference"
              | "external-service"

              | "derived"
              | "inferred";

                      architecture: string

                      id: string | null;

                  | null;

                  disposition: "verified";
                  evidence_ids: string[];
                  rationale: string;
              }
              | {
                  disposition: "withdrawn"
                  | "out-of-scope";

              | null;

              revision_digest: string;
              scope_digest: string
              | null;
              severity: "low" | "medium" | "high" | "critical";
              status: "open" | "investigating" | "blocked" | "contradicted" | "resolved";
              supporting_evidence_ids: string[];
              unknown_id: string;
          },
          AnalysisError,
      >

      • Defined in src/application/BinarySessionPort.ts:63
