                                format:
                                    | "unknown"
                                    | "file"
                                    | "directory"
                                    | "javascript"
                                    | "source-map"
                                    | "plist"
                                    | "entitlements"
                                    | "dmg"
                                    | "zip"
                                    | "pkg"
                                    | "asar"
                                    | "javascript-bundle"
                                    | "mach-o-universal"
                                    | "mach-o"
                                    | "elf"
                                    | "pe"
                                    | "hopper"
                                    | "analysis-database"
                                    | "ipa"
                                    | "apk";
                                local_path: string;
                                name: string;
                            }
                            | null;
                    }
                )[];
                scenarios: {
                    authority: "controlled-replay";
                    evidence_id: string;
                    operation: string;
                }[];
                unknowns: {
                    contradicting_evidence_ids: string[];
                    domain: string;
                    mutation_evidence_ids: string[];
                    previous_revision_digest: string
                    | null;
                    question: string;
                    recommended_probes: { operation: string; rationale: string }[];
                    registry_version: 1;
                    relationships: {
                        type: "depends-on" | "related-to" | "contradicts";
                        unknown_id: string;
                    }[];
                    required_authority: | "shipped-artifact"
                    | "controlled-replay"
                    | "historical-reference"
                    | "external-service"
                    | "analyst-inference"
                    | null;
                    required_confidence: "observed"
                    | "derived"
                    | "inferred";
                    required_environment:
                        | {
                            architecture: string
                            | null;
                            id: string | null;
                            isolation: "process" | "none" | "container" | "virtual-machine" | null;
                            platform: string | null;
                        }
                        | null;
                    resolution: | {
                        disposition: "verified";
                        evidence_ids: string[];
                        rationale: string;
                    }
                    | {
                        disposition: "withdrawn"
                        | "out-of-scope";
                        evidence_ids: string[];
                        rationale: string;
                    }
                    | null;

                    scope_digest: string
                    | null;
                    severity: "low" | "medium" | "high" | "critical";
                    status:
                        | "open"
                        | "investigating"
                        | "blocked"
                        | "contradicted"
                        | "resolved";
                    supporting_evidence_ids: string[];
                    unknown_id: string;
                }[];
            };
            name: string;
            previous_revision_digest: string
            | null;
            revision: number;
            revision_digest: string;
            runs: (
                | {
                    comparison_evidence_id: string
                    | null;
                    completed_stages: (
                        | "inventory_left"
                        | "inventory_right"
                        | "compare_artifacts"
                        | "find_changed_behavior"
                    )[];
                    integrity_continue_approved: boolean;
                    integrity_policy: "fail"
                    | "record-and-continue";

                        format:
                            | "unknown"
                            | "file"
                            | "directory"
                            | "javascript"
                            | "source-map"

                        root_sha256: string;
                    };

                        change_limit: number;
